creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Kevin,

  Could you please tell me, which man page have you been referring to?
  Note that I have committed a small update to the IPFW chapter of our
  Handbook, which I hope describes the differences between
  firewall_type and firewall_script directives well. Please check
  http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/firewalls-ipfw.html

  Let me know if there are any further problems which need to be
  resolved. If no feedback will be received, I will close this PR in
  a week.

-- 
Best regards,
 Daniel                          mailto:danger@FreeBSD.org
